title: iris calabra
intro: Iris calabra, also known as the Italian iris, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iris calabra include alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Iris calabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used for its medicinal properties.
